attribution.changes: Statements formalized into Lean 4 by parZer; 7 declarations are kernel-checked under the trusted axioms; 20 remain conditional on disclosed sorry-stubs.
attribution.title: Some enumerative properties of a class of Fibonacci-like cubes

license.label: cc0 — full Lean file available under commission

nodes.label: rCoeff
nodes.lean: noncomputable def rCoeff (n k : ℕ) : ℤ := (RPoly n).coeff k

nodes.label: qCoeff
nodes.lean: noncomputable def qCoeff (n k : ℕ) : ℤ := (QPoly n).coeff k

nodes.label: hCoeff
nodes.lean: noncomputable def hCoeff (n k : ℕ) : ℤ := (HPoly n).coeff k

nodes.label: dCoeff
nodes.lean: noncomputable def dCoeff (n k : ℕ) : ℤ := (DPoly n).coeff k

nodes.label: dInCoeff
nodes.lean: noncomputable def dInCoeff (n k : ℕ) : ℤ := (DInPoly n).coeff k

nodes.label: Yps
nodes.lean: noncomputable def Yps : PowerSeries (Polynomial ℤ) := PowerSeries.X

nodes.label: Xps
nodes.lean: noncomputable def Xps : PowerSeries (Polynomial ℤ) := PowerSeries.C Polynomial.X

nodes.label: thm_prop_rec_R
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_prop_rec_R (n : ℕ) (h0 : 5 ≤ n) :
    (¬ Even n → RPoly n = X * RPoly (n - 1) + RPoly (n - 2)) ∧
      (Even n → RPoly n = RPoly (n - 1) + X ^ 2 * RPoly (n - 2)) := by
  obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_add_of_le' h0
  -- n = k + 5  (exists_eq_add_of_le' gives n = m + k with m = 5)
  constructor
  · intro hodd
    -- RPoly (k+5) unfolds via the n+5 clause with n := k
    change
        (if Even (k + 5) then RPoly (k + 4) + X ^ 2 * RPoly (k + 3)
         else X * RPoly (k + 4) + RPoly (k + 3)) =
          X * RPoly (k + 5 - 1) + RPoly (k + 5 - 2)
    simp only [hodd, ↓reduceIte]
    simp [show k + 5 - 1 = k + 4 by omega, show k + 5 - 2 = k + 3 by omega]
  · intro hev
    change
        (if Even (k + 5) then RPoly (k + 4) + X ^ 2 * RPoly (k + 3)
         else X * RPoly (k + 4) + RPoly (k + 3)) =
          RPoly (k + 5 - 1) + X ^ 2 * RPoly (k + 5 - 2)
    simp only [hev, ↓reduceIte]
    simp [show k + 5 - 1 = k + 4 by omega, show k + 5 - 2 = k + 3 by omega]

nodes.label: thm_prop_rec_AB
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_prop_rec_AB :
    (∀ m, 4 ≤ m →
        APoly m = (1 + X + X ^ 2) * APoly (m - 1) - X ^ 2 * APoly (m - 2)) ∧
      (∀ m, 3 ≤ m →
        BPoly m = (1 + X + X ^ 2) * BPoly (m - 1) - X ^ 2 * BPoly (m - 2)) := by
  constructor
  · intro m hm
    have eqA := rec_A_from_B m (by omega)
    have eqA'' : APoly (m - 1) = BPoly (m - 2) + X ^ 2 * APoly (m - 2) := by
      have h := rec_A_from_B (m - 1) (by omega)
      -- h: A(m-1) = B((m-1)-1) + X² A((m-1)-1)
      have e : m - 1 - 1 = m - 2 := by omega
      simpa [e] using h
    have eqB' : BPoly (m - 1) = X * APoly (m - 1) + BPoly (m - 2) := by
      have h := rec_B_from_A (m - 1) (by omega)
      have e : m - 1 - 1 = m - 2 := by omega
      simpa [e] using h
    -- A_m = B_{m-1} + X² A_{m-1}
    --     = X A_{m-1} + B_{m-2} + X² A_{m-1}
    --     and B_{m-2} = A_{m-1} - X² A_{m-2} from eqA''
    -- Direct substitution without isolating terms:
    -- A_m = B_{m-1} + X² A_{m-1}
    --     = X A_{m-1} + B_{m-2} + X² A_{m-1}
    --     = X A_{m-1} + (A_{m-1} - X² A_{m-2}) + X² A_{m-1}   [from eqA'']
    -- but rewrite B via eqA'' as A - X² A' by `sub_eq_of_eq_add`
    calc
      APoly m = BPoly (m - 1) + X ^ 2 * APoly (m - 1) := eqA
      _ = X * APoly (m - 1) + BPoly (m - 2) + X ^ 2 * APoly (m - 1) := by
            rw [eqB']
      _ = X * APoly (m - 1) + (APoly (m - 1) - X ^ 2 * APoly (m - 2)) +
            X ^ 2 * APoly (m - 1) := by
            -- replace B(m-2) using eqA'': A(m-1) = B(m-2) + X² A(m-2)
            have h := congr_arg (fun p => p - X ^ 2 * APoly (m - 2)) eqA''
            -- h: A - X²A' = B + X²A' - X²A' = B
            simp only [add_sub_cancel_right] at h
            rw [← h]
      _ = (1 + X + X ^ 2) * APoly (m - 1) - X ^ 2 * APoly (m - 2) := by ring
  · intro m hm
    have eqBm := rec_B_from_A m (by omega)
    have eqAm := rec_A_from_B m hm
    have eqBm1 : BPoly (m - 1) = X * APoly (m - 1) + BPoly (m - 2) := by
      have h := rec_B_from_A (m - 1) (by omega)
      have e : m - 1 - 1 = m - 2 := by omega
      simpa [e] using h
    calc
      BPoly m = X * APoly m + BPoly (m - 1) := eqBm
      _ = X * (BPoly (m - 1) + X ^ 2 * APoly (m - 1)) + BPoly (m - 1) := by rw [eqAm]
      _ = (1 + X) * BPoly (m - 1) + X ^ 3 * APoly (m - 1) := by ring
      _ = (1 + X) * BPoly (m - 1) + X ^ 2 * (X * APoly (m - 1)) := by ring
      _ = (1 + X) * BPoly (m - 1) + X ^ 2 * (BPoly (m - 1) - BPoly (m - 2)) := by
            have h := congr_arg (fun p => p - BPoly (m - 2)) eqBm1
            simp only [add_sub_cancel_right] at h
            rw [← h]
      _ = (1 + X + X ^ 2) * BPoly (m - 1) - X ^ 2 * BPoly (m - 2) := by ring

nodes.label: thm_th_gf_AB
nodes.lean: theorem thm_th_gf_AB : ((PowerSeries.mk (fun m => APoly m) - Yps) * (1 - (1 + Xps + Xps ^ 2) * Yps + Xps ^ 2 * Yps ^ 2) = 1 - Yps + Yps ^ 2) ∧ (PowerSeries.mk (fun m => BPoly m) * (1 - (1 + Xps + Xps ^ 2) * Yps + Xps ^ 2 * Yps ^ 2) = 1 + Xps - (Xps + Xps ^ 2) * Yps) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_th_rnk
nodes.lean: theorem thm_th_rnk : (rCoeff (2 * m) k = (if m = 1 ∧ k = 0 then (1 : ℤ) else 0) + (∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m / 2 + 1), (-1 : ℤ) ^ i * (Nat.choose (m - i) i : ℤ) * trinom (m - 2 * i) (k - 2 * i)) - (∑ i ∈ Finset.range ((m - 1) / 2 + 1), (-1 : ℤ) ^ i * (Nat.choose (m - i - 1) i : ℤ) * trinom (m - 2 * i - 1) (k - 2 * i)) + (∑ i ∈ Finset.range ((m - 2) / 2 + 1), (-1 : ℤ) ^ i * (Nat.choose (m - i - 2) i : ℤ) * trinom (m - 2 * i - 2) (k - 2 * i))) ∧ (rCoeff (2 * m + 1) k = (∑ i ∈ Finset.range (m / 2 + 1), (-1 : ℤ) ^ i * (Nat.choose (m - i) i : ℤ) * (trinom (m - 2 * i) (k - 2 * i) + trinom (m - 2 * i) (k - 2 * i - 1))) - (∑ i ∈ Finset.range ((m - 1) / 2 + 1), (-1 : ℤ) ^ i * (Nat.choose (m - i - 1) i : ℤ) * (trinom (m - 2 * i - 1) (k - 2 * i - 1) + trinom (m - 2 * i - 1) (k - 2 * i - 2)))) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_th_rnx
nodes.lean: theorem thm_th_rnx : PowerSeries.mk (fun n => RPoly n) * (1 - (1 + Xps + Xps ^ 2) * Yps ^ 2 + Xps ^ 2 * Yps ^ 4) = 1 + (1 + Xps) * Yps - (Xps + Xps ^ 2) * Yps ^ 3 - (Xps + Xps ^ 2) * Yps ^ 4 + Xps ^ 2 * Yps ^ 6 := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_cor_fibs
nodes.lean: theorem thm_cor_fibs (h0 : 3 ≤ n) : ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), rCoeff n k = 2 * (Nat.fib n : ℤ) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_prop_rec_q
nodes.lean: theorem thm_prop_rec_q (h0 : 4 ≤ n) : qCoeff n k = qCoeff (n - 1) k + qCoeff (n - 2) k + qCoeff (n - 2) (k - 1) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_prop_rec_Q
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_prop_rec_Q (n : ℕ) (h0 : 5 ≤ n) :
    QPoly n = QPoly (n - 1) + (1 + X) * QPoly (n - 2) := by
  obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_add_of_le' h0
  -- n = k + 5
  change QPoly (k + 4) + (1 + X) * QPoly (k + 3) =
      QPoly (k + 5 - 1) + (1 + X) * QPoly (k + 5 - 2)
  simp [show k + 5 - 1 = k + 4 by omega, show k + 5 - 2 = k + 3 by omega]

nodes.label: thm_th_gf_Q
nodes.lean: theorem thm_th_gf_Q : PowerSeries.mk (fun n => QPoly n) * (1 - Yps - (1 + Xps) * Yps ^ 2) = 1 + (1 + Xps) * Yps - (1 + Xps) ^ 2 * Yps ^ 3 - (1 + Xps) ^ 2 * Yps ^ 4 := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_prop_RF_q
nodes.lean: theorem thm_prop_RF_q : qCoeff n k = (∑ j ∈ Finset.range ((n + 1) / 2 + 1), (Nat.choose (n - j + 1) j : ℤ) * (Nat.choose j k : ℤ)) - (∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc 2 ((n + 1) / 2), (Nat.choose (n - j - 1) (j - 2) : ℤ) * (Nat.choose j k : ℤ)) - (∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n / 2), (Nat.choose (n - j - 2) (j - 2) : ℤ) * (Nat.choose j k : ℤ)) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_blk_27
nodes.lean: theorem thm_blk_27 (h0 : 3 ≤ n) : qCoeff n 0 = 2 * (Nat.fib n : ℤ) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_prop_rec_h
nodes.lean: theorem thm_prop_rec_h (h0 : 6 ≤ n) : hCoeff n k = hCoeff (n - 2) (k - 1) + hCoeff (n - 3) (k - 1) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_prop_rec_H
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_prop_rec_H (n : ℕ) (h0 : 6 ≤ n) :
    HPoly n = X * HPoly (n - 2) + X * HPoly (n - 3) := by
  obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_add_of_le' h0
  change X * HPoly (k + 4) + X * HPoly (k + 3) =
      X * HPoly (k + 6 - 2) + X * HPoly (k + 6 - 3)
  simp [show k + 6 - 2 = k + 4 by omega, show k + 6 - 3 = k + 3 by omega]

/-- (1,3,3)-Padovan as in the paper. -/

nodes.label: thm_blk_30
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_blk_30 (n : ℕ) (h0 : 3 ≤ n) :
    eval (1 : ℤ) (HPoly n) = (padovan (n - 2) : ℤ) := by
  induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with
  | h n ih =>
    match n with
    | 0 | 1 | 2 => omega
    | 3 =>
      change eval (1 : ℤ) (3 * (X : Polynomial ℤ)) = (3 : ℤ)
      simp [eval_mul, eval_X]
    | 4 =>
      change eval (1 : ℤ) (2 * X + X ^ 2) = (3 : ℤ)
      simp [eval_add, eval_mul, eval_X, eval_pow]
    | 5 =>
      change eval (1 : ℤ) (4 * X ^ 2) = (padovan 3 : ℤ)
      simp [padovan, eval_mul, eval_pow, eval_X]
    | n + 6 =>
      -- H(n+6) = X H(n+4) + X H(n+3) definitionally
      have hdef : HPoly (n + 6) = X * HPoly (n + 4) + X * HPoly (n + 3) := rfl
      rw [hdef, eval_add, eval_mul, eval_mul, eval_X, one_mul, one_mul]
      have e1 : eval (1 : ℤ) (HPoly (n + 4)) = (padovan (n + 2) : ℤ) := by
        have h := ih (n + 4) (by omega) (by omega)
        have : (n + 4) - 2 = n + 2 := by omega
        rwa [this] at h
      have e2 : eval (1 : ℤ) (HPoly (n + 3)) = (padovan (n + 1) : ℤ) := by
        have h := ih (n + 3) (by omega) (by omega)
        have : (n + 3) - 2 = n + 1 := by omega
        rwa [this] at h
      rw [e1, e2]
      -- padovan (n+4) = padovan ((n+1)+3) = padovan (n+2) + padovan (n+1)
      have prec : padovan (n + 4) = padovan (n + 2) + padovan (n + 1) := by
        have h := padovan_add3 (n + 1)
        -- h: padovan (n+1+3) = padovan (n+1+1) + padovan (n+1)
        -- i.e. padovan (n+4) = padovan (n+2) + padovan (n+1) after assoc
        simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using h
      have hidx : (n + 6) - 2 = n + 4 := by omega
      rw [hidx]
      exact_mod_cast prec.symm

nodes.label: thm_th_gf_H
nodes.lean: theorem thm_th_gf_H : PowerSeries.mk (fun n => HPoly n) * (1 - Xps * Yps ^ 2 * (1 + Yps)) = 1 + Xps * Yps * (1 + Yps) + 2 * Xps * Yps ^ 3 * (1 + Yps) - Xps ^ 2 * Yps ^ 3 * (1 + Yps) ^ 2 := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_prop_gf_H
nodes.lean: theorem thm_prop_gf_H (h0 : 3 ≤ n) : hCoeff n k = (Nat.choose (k + 1) (n - 2 * k) : ℤ) + (Nat.choose k (n - 2 * k - 1) : ℤ) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_prop_rec_d
nodes.lean: theorem thm_prop_rec_d (h0 : 4 ≤ n) : dCoeff n k = dCoeff (n - 2) (k - 1) + dCoeff (n - 1) (k - 1) - dCoeff (n - 3) (k - 2) + dCoeff (n - 3) (k - 1) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_prop_rec_D
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_prop_rec_D (n : ℕ) (h0 : 6 ≤ n) :
    DPoly n =
      X * DPoly (n - 1) + X * DPoly (n - 2) + (X - X ^ 2) * DPoly (n - 3) := by
  obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_add_of_le' h0
  change
      X * DPoly (k + 5) + X * DPoly (k + 4) + (X - X ^ 2) * DPoly (k + 3) =
        X * DPoly (k + 6 - 1) + X * DPoly (k + 6 - 2) +
          (X - X ^ 2) * DPoly (k + 6 - 3)
  simp [show k + 6 - 1 = k + 5 by omega, show k + 6 - 2 = k + 4 by omega,
    show k + 6 - 3 = k + 3 by omega]

nodes.label: thm_th_gf_D
nodes.lean: theorem thm_th_gf_D : (PowerSeries.mk (fun n => DPoly n) - (- Yps + Xps * Yps + Xps ^ 2 * Yps ^ 2)) * ((1 - Xps * Yps) * (1 - Xps * Yps ^ 2) - Xps * Yps ^ 3) = 1 + Yps - Xps ^ 2 * Yps ^ 2 := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_pro_d
nodes.lean: theorem thm_pro_d (h0 : 3 ≤ n) : dCoeff n k = ∑ j ∈ Finset.range (k + 1), ((Nat.choose (n - 2 * j) (k - j) : ℤ) * (Nat.choose j (n - k - j) : ℤ) + (Nat.choose (n - 2 * j - 1) (k - j) : ℤ) * (Nat.choose j (n - k - j - 1) : ℤ) - (Nat.choose (n - 2 * j - 2) (k - j - 2) : ℤ) * (Nat.choose j (n - k - j) : ℤ)) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_blk_41
nodes.lean: theorem thm_blk_41 (h0 : 3 ≤ n) : ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), dCoeff n k = 2 * (Nat.fib n : ℤ) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_pro_out_d
nodes.lean: theorem thm_pro_out_d (h0 : 3 ≤ n) (h1 : 1 ≤ k) : dInCoeff n k = dInCoeff (n - 1) k + dInCoeff (n - 2) (k - 1) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_pro_ouD
nodes.lean: theorem thm_pro_ouD (h0 : 5 ≤ n) : DInPoly n = DInPoly (n - 1) + Polynomial.X * DInPoly (n - 2) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_prop_QD
nodes.lean: theorem thm_prop_QD : (DInPoly n).comp (1 + Polynomial.X) = QPoly n := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_blk_45
nodes.lean: theorem thm_blk_45 : PowerSeries.mk (fun n => DInPoly n) * (1 - Yps - Xps * Yps ^ 2) = 1 + Xps * Yps - Xps ^ 2 * Yps ^ 3 - Xps ^ 2 * Yps ^ 4 := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_pro_ou_d
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_pro_ou_d (n k : ℕ) :
    dInCoeff n k =
      (Nat.choose (n - k - 2) (k - 1) : ℤ) + (Nat.choose (n - k) k : ℤ) :=
  rfl

nodes.label: thm_blk_48
nodes.lean: theorem thm_blk_48 (h0 : 3 ≤ n) : ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), dInCoeff n k = 2 * (Nat.fib n : ℤ) := by sorry

title: Some enumerative properties of a class of Fibonacci-like cubes

stages.label: Stage 1 — recurrences
stages.blurb: Generating-polynomial recurrences closed under the trusted axioms by base cases plus the paper relations.

stages.label: Stage 2 — evaluation identity
stages.blurb: Maximal-cube polynomial at 1 recovers the Padovan sequence.
